apps/backend-api-quarkus/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Refactor the construction of the dynamic claims map to use a nested HashMap for the 'acme' key instead of a flat Map.of call.

apps/backend-api-springboot3/src/main/ja.general_idea: Update the backend version string in the response payload to reflect the migration to Spring Boot 3.

apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.general_idea: Migrate OAuth2LoginConfigurer usage from deprecated setter methods to the new lambda-based customizer API introduced in Spring Security 6.1+.
apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.why_exists: The setter methods like authorizationRequestResolver() and userAuthoritiesMapper() on the configurers are deprecated and may be removed in future Spring Security versions; using the customizer lambda is the required modern pattern.

apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.general_idea: Migrate OAuth2LoginConfigurer userInfoEndpoint configuration from deprecated setter to lambda customizer.
apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.why_exists: The setter method userAuthoritiesMapper() on UserInfoEndpointConfigurer is deprecated in favor of the lambda customizer pattern.

apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.general_idea: Add explicit permitAll rule for the /auth/register endpoint to support dynamic user self-registration.
Inject CorsEndpointProperties into the SecurityFilterChain bean to enable actuator endpoint CORS configuration if needed.
apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.before: public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http, ClientRegistrationRepository clientRegistrationRepository)
apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.after: public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http, ClientRegistrationRepository clientRegistrationRepository, CorsEndpointProperties corsEndpointProperties)

apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.general_idea: Add beans for OAuth2 authorization request and client repositories to support session-based storage for self-registration flows.
Add bean for OAuth2AuthorizedClientRepository to manage authorized clients in the HTTP session.
Add bean for OAuth2AuthorizedClientService using a custom HttpSession-backed implementation.
Add commented-out method for customizing token endpoint request parameters, likely for future backchannel logout integration.
Replace deprecated SecurityContextHolder.clearContext() with HttpServletRequest.logout() for session invalidation.
apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.why_exists: SecurityContextHolder.clearContext() does not invalidate the HTTP session or remove cookies, leading to potential security issues where the user remains logged in at the container level despite clearing the security context. HttpServletRequest.logout() is the standard, secure way to terminate a session in Spring Security 5.7+/6.x.

apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.general_idea: Add ServletException to method signature to support HttpServletRequest.logout().
apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.why_exists: HttpServletRequest.logout() throws ServletException, so the method signature must be updated to declare this checked exception, otherwise the code will not compile.
apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.after: public ResponseEntity<?> checkSession(Authentication auth, HttpServletRequest request, HttpServletResponse response) throws ServletException

apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.general_idea: Add new endpoint for anonymous user registration via OAuth2/OIDC flow.
apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.after: @GetMapping("/auth/register") public ResponseEntity<?> register(HttpServletRequest request, HttpServletResponse response) { ... }

apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.general_idea: Inject ClientRegistrationRepository and AuthorizationRequestRepository to support the new registration flow.
apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.after: private final ClientRegistrationRepository clientRegistrationRepository; private final AuthorizationRequestRepository<OAuth2AuthorizationRequest> authorizationRequestRepository;

apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.general_idea: Add necessary imports for Servlet API, OAuth2 client components, and URI handling.
apps/frontend-webapp-springboot3/src/mai.after: import jakarta.servlet.ServletException; import jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest; import jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse; import org.springframework.security.oauth2.client.registration.ClientRegistrationRepository; import org.springframework.security.oauth2.client.web.AuthorizationRequestRepository; import org.springframework.security.oauth2.client.web.DefaultOAuth2AuthorizationRequestResolver; import org.springframework.security.oauth2.client.web.OAuth2AuthorizationRequestCustomizers; import org.springframework.security.oauth2.core.endpoint.OAuth2AuthorizationRequest; import java.net.URI;

Add imports for Java security and utility classes used in certificate parsing and functional interfaces.

apps/offline-session-client/src/main/jav.general_idea: Migrate HTTP client dependencies from Apache HttpClient 4.x to Apache HttpClient 5.x.
apps/offline-session-client/src/main/jav.why_exists: The old imports (org.apache.http.*) are removed in HttpClient 5; code fails to compile without updating to org.apache.hc.* packages.

apps/offline-session-client/src/main/jav.general_idea: Update HTTP client initialization to use HttpClient 5.x API for SSL context and connection management.
apps/offline-session-client/src/main/jav.why_exists: The old API (SSLConnectionSocketFactory constructor, HttpClients.custom().setSSLSocketFactory) does not exist in HttpClient 5; code fails to compile.

.scope("openid profile offline_access") //
                    .grantType("password") // for the sake of the demo we use grant_type=password
